description_long: This is a classic sledgehammer with a robust, cylindrical metal head and a straight wooden handle. The head is solid, dark gray, and has a smooth, slightly rounded rectangular shape with flat striking faces on both ends. The handle is medium brown, appears to be made of wood, and is straight with a smooth finish, providing a comfortable grip. The transition between the head and handle is seamless, with no visible fasteners or joints. The hammer is free of any visible branding, markings, or decorative elements. There are no signs of wear, scratches, or damage, and the surfaces appear clean and well-maintained.
description: A sturdy sledgehammer with a dark gray metal head and a straight, smooth wooden handle. The hammer is clean, unmarked, and shows no signs of wear.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from the narrow end of the head, showing the oval face and the full length of the handle.
description_view_1: The hammer is viewed from the side, displaying the full rectangular face of the head and the straight handle.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this shows the opposite narrow end of the head and the handle extending downward.
description_view_3: A side view like view 1, showing the opposite face of the head and the handle.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle, smooth, cylindrical, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: sledgehammer head, solid steel, rectangular with slightly rounded edges, flat striking faces on both ends
